---
title: "Huan Minh Tran, MD, PhD"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/profile.jpg          # TODO: add a photo named profile.jpg in assets/
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:huan.tran@ubc.ca"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/huantranUBC          # TODO
    - text: "ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6415-8021
    - text: "Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=OsfxbQsAAAAJ&hl=en
---

*(he / him / his)*

**Postdoctoral Researcher** · Division of Respiratory Medicine, Faculty of
Medicine · The University of British Columbia, Vancouver Campus

I am a postdoctoral researcher at the **University of British Columbia (UBC)**,
working at the intersection of **respiratory epidemiology**, **climate and air
pollution**, and **biostatistics**.

My research examines how air pollution, extreme temperature, and climate
variability affect chronic respiratory disease — particularly **COPD** — across
scales ranging from individual lung-function decline to country-level mortality.
I combine clinical cohorts, administrative health data, and global ecological
analyses with reproducible statistical pipelines.

## Research interests

- Air pollution, climate & chronic respiratory disease (COPD, asthma)
- Extreme temperature and humidity effects on COPD morbidity and mortality
- Eosinophilic COPD and susceptibility to particulate air pollution
- Global and country-level analyses of climate-related respiratory mortality
- Occupational & environmental exposure — metal fume PM2.5, volatile organic compounds
- Reproducible biostatistics — R, Quarto, high-performance computing

## Current position

**Postdoctoral Researcher**
Division of Respiratory Medicine, Faculty of Medicine
The University of British Columbia, Vancouver Campus

## Contact

2635 Laurel Street, Vancouver, BC V5Z 1M9, Canada
Phone: +1 236 996 8791
Email: [huan.tran@ubc.ca](mailto:huan.tran@ubc.ca)
